title: Gym Instructor/ Fitness Trainer
description:
Job Responsibilities:

Member Assistance & Engagement

· Provide a welcoming and professional presence in the gym.

· Assist members with proper use of gym equipment and machines.

· Offer general fitness guidance and demonstrate exercises when required.

· Ensure members adhere to gym etiquette and safety guidelines.

Equipment Maintenance & Safety

· Conduct regular checks on all gym equipment to ensure they are in good working condition.

· Report any faulty or damaged equipment promptly for repair.

· Maintain cleanliness and hygiene of the gym area, including sanitization of machines and weights.

· Ensure all weight plates and accessories are properly organized and stored after use.

· Ensure safety signage, instructions, and emergency procedures are clearly displayed and followed.

· Perform basic preventive maintenance (Eg. Tightening bolts, adjusting cables) where appropriate.

· Be present and available during any servicing, inspection, or maintenance of gym equipment to ensure safety protocols are followed and to assist service personnel if required.

Class & Training Support

· Support/Conduct group class/PT Sessions as needed.

· Lead warm-up or cool-down sessions when required.

· Assist in organizing and prompting fitness programs, challenges, and events.

· Develop and lead quarterly fitness events, workshops, or challenges to boost member engagement and build a strong gym community.

Administrative Duties

· Monitor gym usage and report any concerns to management.

· Assist with updating signage, safety notices, and member communication.

· Support membership engagement efforts by gathering feedback and addressing member inquiries.

· Receive, coordinate, and delegate personal training requests to appropriate trainers based on availability and specialization.

· Assist members with all personal training -related enquiries, including packages, scheduling, and trainer information.

· Track, calculate, and prepare monthly personal training commissions for trainers, ensuring accuracy and timely reporting.

Requirements:

· Certification in Fitness Instruction or Personal Training (ACE, NASM, ISSA, or equivalent preferred)

· CPR+AED certification

· Minimum of 2 years of experience

· Independent, taking ownership and problem solving

· Have strong interest in Sports & Recreation Activities

· Good administrative and PC skills

· Good interpersonal and organizing skills

· Able to work on weekends and Public Holidays

postedCompany.description:
Established since 1955, Serangoon Gardens Country Club (SGCC) is a premier family-oriented country club. We offer a full suite of sports and recreation, leisure as well as dining and entertainment facilities for members.

Our Club is committed to develop our employees to their full potential by investing in them through training and upgrading programmes. We strive to be the employer of choice and to maintain a healthy work-life balance environment where work is fun, results are rewarding and dreams can become reality.
postedCompany.name: Serangoon Gardens Country Club

districts.location: D19 Serangoon Garden, Hougang, Sengkang, Punggol
